programme.title: Classic Tries
programme.desc: We look back at the most memorable moments legends and tries from Europe's most prestigious international rugby competition.

programme.title: Baby Badgers
programme.desc: Victor, the polar bear, has a sore paw, and the Junior Vets are checking on Adel, the lion, and his injured tail. Also, we meet some baby badgers that need a check-up, and Johnny and Inel bust a crafty chocolate-stealing squirrel.

programme.title: Darwin's Big Air!
programme.desc: Darwin wants to get big air on his BMX bike, so Heni and Newts help him practice!

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: Never Give Up
programme.desc: Things aren't looking great for our Ice Stars as Kloe's lacking confidence, Josh returns home to some shattering news, and ice dancer Ella realises she'll need to work harder to keep the Adriella partnership alive.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Trip to Bhutan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo wish each other a happy New Year when Alim arrives and wishes them a happy birthday. Confused, they follow him to Bhutan, where their friend Dorji explains that in this Himalayan country, everyone turns a year older on New Year's Day.

programme.title: Trip to Myanmar
programme.desc: During a football game, Milo rips his pants. Alim suggests a skirt, but Milo, backed by Zoe, refuses-skirts are for girls! To change their minds, Alim takes them to Myanmar, where they meet Seng, who introduces them to the 'longyi,' a traditional garment worn by all.

programme.title: Tipsy Topsy Wobbling Crane
programme.desc: When a raging river moves the bridge, Darwin and Newts must learn about counterweights so they can build a crane to reach out and retrieve it.

programme.title: Medicine in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Falling sick in the Middle Ages is not a good idea! Dove has trouble finding a cure for Little Lewis when he falls ill. A consultation takes us on a tour of the wacky techniques and beliefs, along with typical treatments used in medieval times.

programme.title: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Bee is bored. Bored, bored, bored. The swarm are looking for a new place to set up their hive and it's turning out to be quite a long journey. Bee tries to keep himself amused but only manages to annoy the rest of the swarm.

programme.title: Following the Fibre Optic Trail
programme.desc: How do data and information travel from one computer to another? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of fibre optics. Have hands-on fun by creating fibre optic strands, and get to know Charles Kuen Kao, the godfather of broadband transmission.

programme.title: Tension and Chemical Kinetics
programme.desc: What exactly is surface tension? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of materials science. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with liquid detergent, and get to know Yuan T. Lee, a chemist, known for his advances in kinetics of chemical reactions.

programme.title: The Past Reveals Itself
programme.desc: The team tries to decipher their first clue in the detention room when they are interrupted by a local historian - Miss Dumont. Principal Lounsberry assigns our heroes to perform in historical reenactment under the watchful eye of Miss Dumont.

programme.title: Monkey Magic
programme.desc: When LingLing's grandmother, Princess Iron Fan, is kidnapped by the Monkey King, she sets off to rescue her. Rose, Hawk, and the team join her quest. Can they handle the mighty Buffalo King, Vicky's tricks, and lots of screaming monkeys?

programme.title: Trapped In Time
programme.desc: Naomi keeps repeating the same day over and over again, until she learns that her selfish attitude is what has caused her to be stuck in the loop.

programme.title: Food
programme.desc: Unlike life in our modern society, in the Middle Ages, people don't eat their fill every day. We follow our foodie Howler as he scavenges around for anything that takes his fancy, overstepping his mark as a mere peasant!

programme.title: Oto Flips
programme.desc: Determined to win a shiny trophy of his own, Oto decides to attempt a world record for the biggest pancake. But can he really make it all by himself? The team sets off to a pancake festival at a Sugarbush in Quebec, Canada, to find out!

programme.title: Surviving in Deep Space
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli looks at how surviving in deep space can become a reality. Lockheed Martin is designing a spacecraft, similar to a smaller International Space Station, where astronauts can comfortably make a three-year trip to Mars and back.

programme.title: The Need for Speed
programme.desc: All eyes are on speed skater Izzy who has one last chance to prove she has got what it takes to represent Team Great Britain at the Olympics. And ice dancer Ella swaps her ice skates for pedals at the velodrome.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Kaiko and Will try to examine a glowing fish but fall under its spell. Ant and Fontaine must rescue their parents, wearing blindfolds.

programme.title: E5 - Women Who Kill - Yoselyn Ortega
programme.desc: Nanny Yoselyn Ortega had been looking after Kevin and Marina's three children. One day, plagued by psychotic thoughts and hearing voices, she snapped, with devastating consequences for two tiny lives.

programme.title: E530 - Sudden Impact
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a late-night meeting spins out of control, leaving a young father dead, his friend critically injured, and their SUV crashed through a child's bedroom.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E1 - Born to Be Different
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a duck that won’t go in the water without a ride from her pooch pal, an elephant that thinks she’s a buffalo, and a herd of cows that adopt an orphaned deer.

programme.title: E5 - The Valley of the Birds
programme.desc: Zambia’s Luangwa Valley is home to Africa’s biggest and most fearsome giants, but what really makes it special are its birds. There are over 400 different species here; each perfectly adapted to exploit every opportunity on offer.

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees
programme.desc: How many trees can you find in the Amazon? And what’s it like to live up in them? Travel through the canopy and see how more than 1200 species of trees coexist. Plus, follow monkeys and other creatures who call these trees home.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E86

programme.title: E12 - Alone In The World
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas are in complete autonomy deep in the remote wilderness of Kluane National Park. Facing unpredictable weather and no emergency support, their knowledge is put to the test.

programme.title: E12 - The Feat Of Teintures De France
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: E15 - From The Riviera To Snowy Peaks!
programme.desc: Heading to the Swiss Valais where the Vingt-Deux, a tiny restaurant, is enjoying huge success. The incredible adventure of the animated film ''Flow,'' largely created in Belgium. The Buissonniere store celebrates its 40th anniversary! And the Gilles of La Louviere at the prestigious Nice carnival.

programme.title: E44 - Sea Bass Carpaccio With Wild Mustard On Ile De Re
programme.desc: Alessandra Montagne discovers one of Ile de Re's hidden treasures, found among the salt marshes and coastal dunes: wild mustard. On the menu: sea bass carpaccio with wild mustard and a marinade made with local vodka.

programme.title: E10 - Acid Ocean
programme.desc: In 2025, humanity officially crossed a seventh planetary boundary: ocean acidification. A critical threshold with irreversible consequences for marine ecosystems. At the tip of Finistere, Fabrice Pernet must rethink his work as a researcher. He studies shellfish, sentinels of this disruption.

programme.title: International Cross-Strait Critics
programme.desc: The global situation is changing rapidly, and the interactions between the two sides of the Taiwan Strait and the four regions are frequent, with every action closely related. 'International Cross-Strait Critics' has different experts who will guide you from the superficial to the profound, helping you grasp the development context, deconstruct the major trends, and gain insights into new domains.

programme.title: E16 - Sofa
programme.desc: Stanley has to fix Myrtles wobbly sofa so her and her friends can watch Fred and Fifi on the Boogie Woogie Dance Show together. He ends up creating a super-duper special sofa.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E31 - The Stick Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: E20 - Peas
programme.desc: Two peas perform a happy song.

programme.title: E30 - Turtle Boy
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: E31 - Burger Shop
programme.desc: It's time for Bluey and Bingo to get out of the bath. But Dad has decided not to tell them what to do and gets roped into a game of Burger Shop.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E43 - Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: E14 - Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: E13 - Central Park, New York
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.desc: Stanley has to fix Myrtles wobbly sofa so her and her friends can watch Fred and Fifi on the Boogie Woogie Dance Show together. He ends up creating a super-duper special sofa.

programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: E20 - Peas
programme.desc: Two peas perform a happy song.

programme.title: E7 - Yoyo
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'yo-yo' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a stripy yo-yo, some spotty yo-yos, a flashy yo-yo and even a peepo yo-yo!

programme.title: E23 - Sleepless In Okido
programme.desc: It's the Great OKIDO Sleepover, but there is a loud noise keeping Messy awake.

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E30 - Turtle Boy
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: E9 - Go Jetter Heroes: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Inspired by her hero Amelia Earhart, Xuli attempts a solo flight across the Atlantic.

programme.title: E43 - Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: E17 - Andy And The Fur Seal Pup
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond notices a fur seal pup wandering alone in a forest away from the ocean, it's up to Andy to find out why.

programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: E23 - Thomas And The Royal Engine

programme.title: The Debate[Live]
programme.desc: Live debate show on the key topic of the day with four guests from different spots of the globe, from Monday to Thursday. The show is well known for its dynamics due to live debates with its various guests.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Lee Lai Chun
programme.desc: Lee Lai Chun, a cinema goddess in the 1980s and 90s, has made her appearances in numerous Hong Kong movies. She seems to be a productive actress; but she admits that comparing to Carol ‘Dodo' Cheng or Sandra Ng who both has simultaneously worked on 9 film sets, doing 3 films at the same time for her is already exhausting enough. When she talks about the mode of filmmaking then and now, she misses and cherishes her family bonding with Tung Piu and Lydia Shum on the sets of the classic Lunar-New-Year series IT'S A MAD MAD MAD WORLD. Being in the film industry for over 30 years, though she has been awarded the Golden Horse Best Leading Actress, she regretfully says that she has not seen the birth of her own iconic role. Then, what does her ideal representative work looks like?

programme.title: Rich & Famous
programme.desc: Yung was caught red-handed in making a mischief. He and his friend Ying Hung decided to rob Chu Lo Tai. However, the attempt of robbery was unsuccessful and they were pursued...

programme.title: With Or Without You
programme.desc: Police detective Ming loses his gun during a drunken binge and attempts to recover it while romancing PR girl Tweedy. That's the gist of the first two-thirds of the slackly-paced story, which is enlivened by a gun battle, a chase on foot through speeding cars, and comic relief provided by Ming's partner. Things really heat up, though, when Tweedy's old boyfriend Prince, a psychotic killer, comes back to town...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Lee Lai Chun
programme.desc: Lee Lai Chun, a cinema goddess in the 1980s and 90s, has made her appearances in numerous Hong Kong movies. She seems to be a productive actress; but she admits that comparing to Carol ‘Dodo' Cheng or Sandra Ng who both has simultaneously worked on 9 film sets, doing 3 films at the same time for her is already exhausting enough. When she talks about the mode of filmmaking then and now, she misses and cherishes her family bonding with Tung Piu and Lydia Shum on the sets of the classic Lunar-New-Year series IT'S A MAD MAD MAD WORLD. Being in the film industry for over 30 years, though she has been awarded the Golden Horse Best Leading Actress, she regretfully says that she has not seen the birth of her own iconic role. Then, what does her ideal representative work looks like?

programme.title: Funny Ghost
programme.desc: Taxi dancer Yue puts herself head over heels in debt because of gambling. She tries to borrow a loan from her close friend, Ngor, with tricks of suicide. She pretendedly pushes Ngor down a tall building but falls from the rooftop herself. She has got a narrow escape and a windfall of picking up a sack of money from a Chinese spiritualized vase which belongs to a big brother, Hung. With the help of the spirit, Yue and Ngor win so much that they almost lose their sense. They want to keep the vase themselves so they must get away from the pursuit of a killer sent by Hung, as well as another two mysterious detectives...

programme.title: The Miracle Fighters
programme.desc: Two elderly Taoist priests, Chi Men and Dun Jia, who learn their magic from the same teacher always quarrel with each other. They provide mirth and expert kung fu tuition to young man who is mistakenly presumed to be the crown prince of the Imperial Court, missing since childhood. The emperor dispatches an eunuch with the magic powers to apprehend the young man. But he must first deal with Chi Men and Dun Jia who are the young man's protector...

programme.title: E248 - Tales From The Omnitrix/Mayhem In Mascot/Screamcatcher/Creature Feature/Growing Up Is
programme.desc: Team Tennyson trade campfire stories in an anthology-style series that pits Ben against his archrival, Kevin 11, and teaches our hero the power of imagination.

programme.title: E1 - Shiro Is The Super Hero/A Bizarre Biscuit Factory
programme.desc: With the ordinary Nohara family, lives an ordinary dog, whose name is very ordinary, Shiro. The one thing that isn't ordinary? He's a superhero!

programme.title: E138 - Nip And Duck / Telephone Pole Gag 2: Circular Fan / Asphalt And Battery/Lesson Plan 9
programme.desc: Daffy Duck learns he’s a truly terrible tailor. Sylvester is a fan of great food. Wile E. Coyote’s new machine can make roads, but can it also make dinner?

programme.title: E11 - A. The Mustache/The Date/The Club/The Wand/The Ape
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin's wish comes true when they suddenly turn into men.

programme.title: E71 - Clarence Wendle and the Eye of Coogan/Skater Sumo
programme.desc: Clarence and a few other students find the crusty old journal of Coogan, filled with clues leading to a mysterious treasure. Clarence spearheads the team of treasure hunters to journey through the perils of Aberdale, seeking the lost Eye of Coogan.

programme.title: E39 - A. The Kids/The Fan/The Coach/The Joy/The Recipe
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are showing no signs of growing up.

programme.title: E39 - Future Vision/On the Run
programme.desc: Steven learns that Garnet can see into the future and becomes curious about the possible dangers that lurk around him.

programme.title: E34 - Temple Bears/Lighthouse/Doll's House/The Little Fallen Star
programme.desc: The Bears search for a house key in a puzzle-filled temple.

programme.title: E8 - B. Ocean of Fear/When Wedding Bells Thaw/Freak City/The Duke of Nuts/An Ogre Named Do
programme.desc: Finn faces his biggest challenge yet - overcoming his fear of water.

programme.title: Russian Threats Everyday: How Estonian Border Guards Keep The Eu Safe
programme.desc: Rasmus is a young border guard working on Estonia's frontier with Russia, one of the most closely watched borders in Europe. We spent two days with Rasmus as we went on patrol across forests, a frozen lake and border villages to see how risks and security threats are managed here every day.

programme.title: E113 - Journey to the Otter Side
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: E209 - She's All Splat
programme.desc: With Cherry working at Splat by Sea, Max ropes her into a fake dating scheme to score partner discounts at the restaurant. Chloe faces a tough choice between winning a trivia competition or supporting her brother Billy when he wants to join her team.

programme.title: E213 - The Mastermind Unmasked: Part 2
programme.desc: When B.C. forces Chloe to steal a magical amulet that grants him superhero powers, the Thundermans unite to stop his plan. Chloe must reveal her identity to save her friends.

programme.title: E401 - Sitcom Stars / The Show Must Go Yawn
programme.desc: When Cecil's boss visits the house, the Stars get trapped in a sitcom. // When Squidina is bedridden, Patrick has to run his show without her.

programme.title: E718 - Let's Break A Deal / A Dish Come True
programme.desc: Rusty strikes a deal with Morpheus that for a seemingly small price, Morpheus will cast spells for him. // Lincoln starts to work at Dad's restaurant when he hears that the best employee wins a dish named in their honor.

programme.title: E101 - Best Summer Ever?
programme.desc: Jack & Lily are half-siblings living on opposite ends of the world both hoping to have the 'best summer ever.' When dangerous events forces Jack's mom to send him to live with his dad, the kids fear their summer dreams have become a nightmare.

programme.title: E213 - The Mastermind Unmasked: Part 2
programme.desc: When B.C. forces Chloe to steal a magical amulet that grants him superhero powers, the Thundermans unite to stop his plan. Chloe must reveal her identity to save her friends.

programme.title: E110 - Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: E115 - Cover Girls / Save the Date
programme.desc: When all 10 of Lincoln’s sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full. // Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Bobby’s little sister, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Farmers in Western Australia growing premium wheat for noodles; and the small mixed farm growing Australia's only commercial crop of white asparagus.

programme.title: E6 - Alexandria, Nsw
programme.desc: Young professionals Stuart and Monique Cormack are desperate to reinvent their tiny, neglected backyard. Will their big dreams fit their pint-sized, terrace garden?

programme.title: E12 - The Dream
programme.desc: After WWII, Australian society underwent massive growth and rapid transformation driven by post-war immigration, the baby boom and the government's encouragement to own your own home - this is the Great Australian Dream.

programme.title: E65
programme.desc: Melissa Mackay brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E211 - The Great Abuela Cookoff / Missing Map
programme.desc: After the Pokey Pigeons eat all of Abuela's elotes, Dora and Boots set out to find more ingredients for the Great Abuela Cook-off. / Dora, Boots and Backpack play an adventurous game of Hide-and-Seek to find Map.

programme.title: E301 - Work And Play
programme.desc: When Peppa and Suzy learn that grown ups must work all day, they decide to play at working in a store. But they quickly get tired of it.

programme.title: E303 - Pedro's Cough
programme.desc: Pedro gets a contagious cough at daycare and other children soon catch it. When it's time to go the grown-ups catch it too, including Madame Gazelle. Doctor Brown Bear gives them terrible-tasting medicine, but who will look after him when he is sick?

programme.title: E304 - The Library
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has a book from the library that he has kept for too long. The family go to the library to return it and find more books to read.

programme.title: E301 - Work And Play
programme.desc: When Peppa and Suzy learn that grown ups must work all day, they decide to play at working in a store. But they quickly get tired of it.

programme.title: E304 - The Library
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has a book from the library that he has kept for too long. The family go to the library to return it and find more books to read.

programme.title: E205 - Crabby Wedding / The Cloud Kingdom
programme.desc: Dora's crab friends are getting married but Swiper swipes the ring and loses it in the ocean. Dora has to get the ring back! / Dora and Boots meet Vicky the Vicuna who is missing her magic flute that she needs to go back to the Cloud Kingdom.

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: E201 - The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space
programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: E814 - Children's Festival
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy go on a trip to the children's festival where there is lots of singing, dancing, making crafts and listening to stories.

programme.title: E815 - Muddy Festival
programme.desc: Peppa and her family sleep overnight in a tent and wake up to find the whole festival is covered in mud. Peppa is thrilled!

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: E404 - Sun, Sea And Snow
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends and family are looking forward to a trip to the beach where they can make sandcastles, but when they arrive at the beach there is too much snow!

programme.title: E201 - The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Brgy[Live]
programme.desc: 'BRGY' is a daily talk-magazine-lifestyle show that celebrates stories about Filipinos by Filipinos. The show aims to bring home every Filipino wherever they are in the world. Sharing and conversations won't be limited to one space but it can be wherever your heart feel at ease.

programme.title: Jagadhatri E139
programme.desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

programme.title: Vasudha E489
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

programme.title: Saru E320
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E2 - Baby John's Favorite Animal Songs!
programme.desc: Sing along to Baby John's favorite animal songs! First, the kids welcome a new puppy named Bingo to the family & sing the classic nursery rhyme about him! Then, the family acts out the story of Humpty Dumpty Sat on a Wall. The animal fun continues as Baby John spends the day at the aquarium & runs into Baby Shark! He learns the 'Baby Shark' dance & has an exciting dance marathon! Plus, the family dresses up like little dinosaurs!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E5 - Twinkle Bedtime Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E31 - '搬磚男神'回歸
programme.desc: 《一站到底》升級進入競速時代，答題拼速度，輸贏靠積分! 選手對決人數由10人變為8人，首度開啟搶答模式，除站位獎外再增豐富答題連擊獎，連續守擂三期的選手更有機會獲得高薪工作機會。

programme.title: E49
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E7 - 劍擊隊美男子來徵婚
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. Airing CNBC's award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Morning Call
programme.desc: Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead. The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E46
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

Men of Plastic
programme.desc: The most glamorous part of Seoul, Apgujeong thrives with new possibilities. Dae-guk who is a native of Apgujeong and rules its ground, is eager to start his own groundbreaking plastic surgery business. Then he encounters Ji-woo, the most talented surgeon in the area who lost his medical license due to someone sabotaging his reputation. Dae-guk effortlessly comes up with an idea to make this business happen, and he does everything he can to make Ji-woo his partner. Together, Dae-guk and Ji-woo open a whole new era of Apgujeong.
